name: 3' Pre-Lit Potted Mix Glitter Pinecones Artificial Christmas Tree - Wondershop™
description:
Add a soft touch to your holiday decor with this Pre-Lit Potted Mix Glitter Pinecones Artificial Tree from Wondershop™. This artificial tree features glittered mixed leaves in green, brown pinecones, and red poinsettias for a wintry look. Plus, it's decorated with 50 LED bulbs with constant lighting for festive ambiance. It features a push-button control for easy on and off and is housed in a brown rectangular pot for instant display on your floor or tabletop.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
